rawAssistant: Storms do not sleep, but Hollowfen does. Tonight, perhaps, it chooses to let your party pass unscathed. Yet, one can never be too certain in this land. A look at that road ahead might give us some clarity – the signs there speak of secrets waiting to be uncovered.
